extension.description: v4.7.0: Trakt card now flexes your taste - adds TOTAL WATCH TIME (auto formatted to hours or days) plus your TOP GENRE tallied from all watched shows (weighted by play count). v4.6.9: Richer Account Cards with days left, expiry, fidelity, Trakt stats + lists, TMDB live key validation. v4.6.8: Fixed View Account Cards crash after RD auth and stopped 'Install addon?' prompts during sync. v4.6.7: Speed Test - gauge redrawn as a proper speedometer. v4.6.6: Full-screen Account Cards and Speed Test. Previous features: Save My Build, Log Uploader, device code auth, syncs to 18+ addons.
